# `library_codex.graph.GraphCounting`

彩色多項式・有向/無向全域木数・有向Euler閉路数。

- 計算量の目安: subset法 / Matrix--Tree / BEST定理
- source: [`graph/GraphCounting.py`](../../../graph/GraphCounting.py)
- 公開API: function 5、class 0、method/property 0（Python protocol 0を含む）

## Import

```python
from library_codex.graph.GraphCounting import (
    chromatic_polynomial,
    evaluate_polynomial,
    count_undirected_spanning_trees,
    count_directed_spanning_trees,
    count_eulerian_circuits,
)
```
